# logtail_exploration_group (Data Source)

This data source allows you to get information about an Exploration Group in Better Stack Telemetry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "logtail_exploration_group" "this" {
  name = "Production explorations"

  depends_on = [logtail_exploration_group.this]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of this exploration group.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when this exploration group was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this exploration group.
- `team_name` (String) Used to specify the team the resource should be created in when using global tokens. You can't update this value later.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when this exploration group was updated.
